name: Ozark Pickleball & Sports Complex
description: Visit https://www.ozarkcommunitypickleball.com/groupme-chat-app.html to connect with other players about specific play days and times.
open_play_schedule: Members can access the indoor courts any day, any time. Courts are open 24/7 with membership and FOB. Business hours typically Mon, Tues, Thurs, Fri from 2pm until 7 pm.  Suggest calling ahead if you not have a membership.

name: Steagall Park
description: Steagall Park is a place to play pickleball in Ozark, AL. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.
